german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core and Customer-facing PMs Share Equal Dominance
pm_type.subtitle: Balanced representation indicates no significant preference for one PM type over the other.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 55% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: Work Modes Reflect Diverse Preferences Among Employees
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce favors hybrid and onsite arrangements, indicating a need for flexible work options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: Over half of roles now prioritize AI responsibilities and skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
